bride.bio: Perla is a warm and vibrant colorful soul who lights up every room she enters. She like the yellow color, choco prince chocolate, and cooks delicious food. She is known for her infectious laughter, creative spirit, and kind heart. She is an agricultural engineer and an organic farmer, her sole enemies are worms and insects. She has also a great analytical mind and a great problem solver. She loves excel sheets and pie charts

groom.bio: Antonio is a dedicated professional with a passion for AI and Data. He likes cycling, hiking, nature. He is known for his analytical mind, loyalty to those he loves, and his ability to make people smile. He enjoys problem-solving, outdoor adventures, and quality time with loved ones. He loves excel sheets and pie charts.

chatbot_faqs.question: What is the dress code?
chatbot_faqs.answer: Semi-formal/Garden party attire. Think sundresses, light suits, and garden party chic. Please note the ceremony will be outdoors on grass, so choose footwear accordingly!

chatbot_faqs.question: Can I bring a plus-one?
chatbot_faqs.answer: We have limited space, so we can only accommodate guests formally invited on your invitation. If you received a plus-one, it will be indicated on your invitation.

chatbot_faqs.question: Will the ceremony be indoors or outdoors?
chatbot_faqs.answer: Both the ceremony and reception will be outdoors. We have a covered pavilion in case of rain, and the reception area is partially covered.

chatbot_faqs.question: Are children welcome?
chatbot_faqs.answer: While we love your little ones, we have decided to make our wedding an adults-only celebration. We hope this gives you a chance to let loose and enjoy the evening!

chatbot_faqs.question: What time should I arrive?
chatbot_faqs.answer: Please arrive by 3:30 PM to find parking and get seated before the 4:00 PM ceremony start time.

chatbot_faqs.question: Is there parking available?
chatbot_faqs.answer: Yes! There is ample free parking on-site. Valet service will also be available.

chatbot_faqs.question: Will there be food and drinks?
chatbot_faqs.answer: Yes! A full dinner will be served, along with beer, wine, and signature cocktails. Please let us know of any dietary restrictions when you RSVP.

chatbot_faqs.question: Can I take photos during the ceremony?
chatbot_faqs.answer: We kindly ask that you put away your phones and cameras during the ceremony so you can be fully present. Our professional photographer will capture all the special moments. Feel free to take photos during the reception!

chatbot.welcomeMessage: Hi! 👋 I'm here to help answer any questions about Perla & Antonio's wedding. Feel free to ask me anything!
chatbot.customInstructions:
Additional Guidelines:
- Theme: Our wedding has a beautiful sunflower theme 🌻
- Dress Code: Semi-formal/Garden party attire (mention comfortable footwear for outdoor grass)
- Photography: Professional photographer will capture the ceremony, guests can take photos during reception
- Adults-only celebration
- Parking and valet service available on-site
- Shuttle service from recommended hotels
- Full dinner and drinks will be served

Be extra warm and enthusiastic! This is a celebration of love! 💐✨
